pr.title: PR #135 — Execution Constraint Framework v1
pr.description:
## Summary

Adds the **constraint** layer of the execution roadmap (`Capability Chain → Execution Context → Execution Environment → Execution Resource → Execution Constraint`). Where the resource layer captures *what execution requires*, this layer captures *the limitations/boundaries execution must obey* — observational and declarative only (no enforcement/orchestration/scheduling/optimization per non-goals). Same deterministic, append-only pattern as #132–#134.

New module `axiom_core/execution_constraint.py`:
- `ExecutionConstraint` (constraint_id, context_id, environment_id, resource_id, capability_id, `constraint_type` ∈ TIME/MEMORY/STORAGE/SECURITY/NETWORK/TOOLING/VERSION/POLICY/DEPENDENCY/OTHER, `severity` ∈ INFO/WARNING/ERROR/CRITICAL, references, summary, raw_payload, schema_version)
- `ExecutionConstraintReference` (reference_type ∈ CAPABILITY/CONTEXT/ENVIRONMENT/RESOURCE/FILE/VALIDATION/ARTIFACT/POLICY/OTHER)
- `ExecutionConstraintReport` (constraint_count, severity_counts, constraint_type_counts, critical_count, error_count, duplicate_constraint_count)
- `ExecutionConstraintEvidence` + `ExecutionConstraintEngine`

Engine behavior (mirrors `ExecutionResourceEngine`):
- validate → normalize (types/severities/reference-types upper-cased) → sort → dedupe → aggregate → evidence-bundle
- dedup key (keep first): `(context_id, environment_id, resource_id, capability_id, constraint_type)`
- sort key: `(context_id, environment_id, resource_id, capability_id, constraint_type, severity, constraint_id)`; references sorted `(reference_type, reference_value, reference_id)`
- `passed = constraint_count > 0 and critical_count == 0 and error_count == 0` (empty → fail)

```
critical_count = severity_counts.get("CRITICAL", 0)
error_count    = severity_counts.get("ERROR", 0)
```

CLI: `execution-constraint-create / execution-constraints / execution-constraint-show / execution-constraint-export` (JSON/Markdown/CSV) in `axiom_cli/main.py`; registered in `command_registry.py` (READ_ONLY/SAFE, 4-file evidence bundle under `artifacts/execution_constraint/<run_id>/`), `test_selection_engine.py`, `test_command_registry.py` EXPECTED set, and `.gitignore`.

## Validation
- `poetry run pytest -q` → **4581 passed, 1 skipped** (+53; baseline 4528 at #134)
- `poetry run ruff check src/ tests/` → **0 errors**
- CLI smoke (adversarial: 4 constraints, 1 case-insensitive duplicate `(ctx-1,env-1,res-1,cap-1,TIME)`, 1 CRITICAL, 2 ERROR, lowercase types/severities, out-of-order references) → constraint_count 3 / duplicate 1 / critical 1 / error 2; sorted severity + type counts; deterministic ordering


Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/8ad1c9ac0d2f4252bb77647f1eabaac7
Requested by: @plamen-dev
pr.author: plamen-dev
